Property.sap:label: Open Item Management
Property.sap:quickinfo: Managed on an Open Item Basis

Property.sap:label: Fiscal Year of Clearing Journal Entry

Property.sap:label: Invoice Document No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Document Number of an Invoice Document

Property.sap:label: Gross Invoice Amount
Property.sap:quickinfo: Gross Invoice Amount in Document Currency

Property.sap:label: IV category
Property.sap:quickinfo: Origin of a Logistics Invoice Verification Document

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Entered By
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of the Processor Who Entered the Object

Property.Name: InvoiceReference
Property.sap:label: InR.Reference number
Property.sap:quickinfo: Invoice reference: Document number for invoice reference

Property.Name: InvoiceReferenceFiscalYear
Property.sap:label: Fiscal Year
Property.sap:quickinfo: Fiscal Year of the Relevant Invoice (for Credit Memo)

Property.Name: CreationDate
Property.sap:label: Entry Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Day On Which Accounting Document Was Entered

Property.Name: DueCalculationBaseDate
Property.sap:label: Baseline Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Baseline Date for Due Date Calculation

Property.Name: ManualCashDiscount
Property.sap:label: CD Amount
Property.sap:quickinfo: Cash Discount Amount in Document Currency

Property.sap:label: Country/Region Specific Reference 1
Property.sap:quickinfo: Country/Region Specific Reference 1 in the Document

Property.sap:label: Country/Region Specific Date 1
Property.sap:quickinfo: Country/Region Specific Date 1 in the Document

Property.Name: IsOneTimeAccount
Property.sap:label: One-time account
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is the account a one-time account?

Property.Name: AlternativePayeeAccountNumber
Property.sap:label: Alternative Payee
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account Number of the Alternative Payee

Property.Name: BirthDate
Property.sap:label: Date of Birth
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date of Birth of the Person Subject to Withholding Tax

Property.Name: AlternativePayeeIsAllowed
Property.sap:label: Payee in Document
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Alternative Payee in Document Allowed?

Property.Name: ManualDeliveryAddressID
Property.sap:quickinfo: Manual address number in purchasing document item

Property.Name: Subcontractor
Property.sap:quickinfo: Supplier to be Supplied/Who is to Receive Delivery

Property.sap:label: Equal To
Property.sap:quickinfo: Numerator for Conversion of Order Unit to Base Unit

Property.sap:quickinfo: Denominator for Conversion of Order Unit to Base Unit

Property.Name: PurchaseContractItem
Property.sap:label: Agreement Item
Property.sap:quickinfo: Item Number of Principal Purchase Agreement

Property.Name: NetAmount
Property.sap:label: Net Order Value
Property.sap:quickinfo: Net Order Value in PO Currency

Property.Name: GrossAmount
Property.sap:label: Gross order value
Property.sap:quickinfo: Gross order value in PO currency

Property.Name: NetPriceAmount
